title: Name of deceased spouse or partner
question: What was {deceasedName}'s husband's, wife's or civil partner's name?
explanation1: If they are listed in the will or any codicils, enter their name exactly as it is written there.
deceasedSpouseName: Full name of {deceasedName}'s husband, wife or civil partner

deceasedSpouseName.required: Enter the full name of {deceasedName}'s husband, wife or civil partner
